seo_title: 10x10 Mobile Chicken Coop Plans with 4x10 Elevated House | Digital DIY Plans PDF | Pasture Rotation Tractor for Layers or Broilers
category_hint: Craft Supplies & Tools > Patterns & How To > Sewing & Needlecraft Patterns (verify exact taxonomy at runtime via getSellerTaxonomyNodes)
image_concepts: Hero — finished CAD render or prototype photo with bold 'DIGITAL PLANS' and 'NO PHYSICAL COOP SHIPPED' overlay
Dimensions — 10' x 10' run, 4' x 10' upper coop, 48 inch mobile lower run height
Top-view plan — layout of run, elevated coop, access points, nest/roost zone
Side-view plan — sloped roof, upper coop, lower run height, pop door/ramp
Frame/exploded view — skids, base frame, upper coop frame, roof framing
Wheel/skid detail — 4x6 skids, axle-mounted pneumatic wheels, tow tongue
Layer-hen setup — 3 nest boxes, removable roosts, pop door
Broiler setup — open lower run, feeders, waterers, shade, frequent moves
What's included — PDF, material list, cut list, 15-step build guide
Disclaimer — DIY plans, verify local conditions, no physical coop shipped
proof_assets_required_before_listing: Hand sketch showing the 10' x 10' base and 4' x 10' elevated coop
CAD or SketchUp exploded frame screenshot
Close-up drawing of the wheel/skid system
Material-stack photo if building a prototype
At least three in-progress build photos if prototype starts
Finished prototype photo before claiming built or field-tested
Listing image that clearly says DIGITAL PLANS - NO PHYSICAL COOP SHIPPED
